model_shown: KAMA electric mini flatbed truck (single cabin) — family-level, exact model code not stated on source
ev_evidence: POSITIVE — orange high-voltage cabling and a black battery pack are visible along the chassis underframe; no exhaust, no fuel filler. Confirmed BEV. Decal '总质量 3060 kg / 栏板高度 360mm' (GVW 3.06t, side-panel height 360mm) — within the EW/EV family GVW range (2.1-3.4t).
family_match_rationale: EW/EV = electric mini flatbed truck, single cabin, GVW 2.1-3.4t. This is a single-cab electric flatbed at 3.06t GVW — body type, cabin config and class match the family spec. Per founder SKU-match policy, family-level photography is acceptable for series SKUs without exact model-suffix badges.
rights_source: KAMA Auto export brand site (Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. parent); registry ratified 2026-07-08. Self-hosted CMS image (zb_users/upload), no marketplace watermark.
angle: straight side profile (permitted secondary standard per C-HERO Step 1; 3/4 front was not available at manufacturer-domain quality for this family)
steering_side: Appears LHD from the visible near-side steering position, but this is a generic family-level photo with no stated model code. EW1/EW2 records specify RHD; EV1/EV2/EV3 unconfirmed. Steering side NOT authoritative from this source — recorded as observed only.
preflight: PASS — straight side profile (secondary standard), no motion blur, no occlusions crossing silhouette, no platform watermark. Product long edge 2500px native; no upscale needed. Distinguished from the flagged EV1 double-cabin candidate — this is single-cabin, matching the family spec.
processing_note: Cropped to truck (L70/T400/1880x1290). remove_background on native crop was clean — thin headboard rails and bed stake-rails retained with correct see-through transparency (audited at 200%; one minor residual haze speck between two rails, non-disqualifying). keep-largest-connected-component pass removed stray fringe. No upscale, no product alteration.
